findings.title: Express Default: 13 Security Headers Missing
findings.description: Express does not set any security headers by default. Missing: Content-Security-Policy, Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy, Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy, Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy, X-DNS-Prefetch-Control... Helmet.js or manual configuration required.

findings.title: Express Default: 11 Security Headers Missing
findings.description: Express does not set any security headers by default. Missing: Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy, Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy, Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy, X-DNS-Prefetch-Control, X-Frame-Options... Helmet.js or manual configuration required.

findings.title: Body Parser Error Leaks Details Before Auth Check
findings.description: body-parser returns detailed parse errors before authentication: {"error":"Unexpected token 'n', \"not valid json\" is not valid JSON","stack":"SyntaxError: Unexpected token 'n', \"not valid json\" is not valid JSON\n    at JSON.parse (<anonymous>)\n    at createSt
findings.note: body-parser middleware runs before route auth — parse errors bypass auth

findings.title: CORS Preflight Bypasses Auth on Protected Endpoint
findings.description: OPTIONS /admin/dashboard returns 204 with CORS headers without authentication check. CORS middleware runs before auth.
findings.note: CORS preflight is by design unauthenticated — but reveals endpoint existence
